news.title:
BEML secures its first international metro rolling stock order worth $60M (₹5.5B).
The order involves design, production, supply, testing, and commissioning for Africa.
news.summary:
BEML secures its first international metro rolling stock order worth $60M (₹5.5B).
The order involves design, production, supply, testing, and commissioning for Africa.

news.title: BEML Ltd secures an order valued at $60 million.
news.summary: BEML Ltd secures an order valued at $60 million.

news.title:
India's ₹16 lakh crore high-speed rail project boosts railway stocks, with Titagarh Rail Systems, BEML, and Jupiter Wagons set to benefit.
Titagarh focuses on passenger rail, Jupiter expands wheelset capacity, and BEML readies high-speed train facilities for future demand.
news.summary:
India's ₹16 lakh crore high-speed rail project boosts railway stocks, with Titagarh Rail Systems, BEML, and Jupiter Wagons set to benefit.
Titagarh focuses on passenger rail, Jupiter expands wheelset capacity, and BEML readies high-speed train facilities for future demand.

news.title:
BEML Dec 2025 net sales rose 23.7% Y-o-Y to Rs 1,083.3 crore; net loss dropped by 191.7%.
EBITDA fell 88.5%, shares closed at Rs 1,736.7 on Feb 16, 2026, yielding 29.1% annual return.
news.summary:
BEML Dec 2025 net sales rose 23.7% Y-o-Y to Rs 1,083.3 crore; net loss dropped by 191.7%.
EBITDA fell 88.5%, shares closed at Rs 1,736.7 on Feb 16, 2026, yielding 29.1% annual return.

news.title:
BEML expects margin recovery with defence and rail driving growth; FY27 capex to boost railway capacity.
Q3FY26 revenue rose 24% YoY; defence revenue projected to grow 80% YoY with better margins.
news.summary:
BEML expects margin recovery with defence and rail driving growth; FY27 capex to boost railway capacity.
Q3FY26 revenue rose 24% YoY; defence revenue projected to grow 80% YoY with better margins.

news.title:
BEML Ltd announces participation in Elara Capital's conference call on 12.02.2026 at 1 PM.
The call will discuss financial results for the quarter ended 31.12.2025.
news.summary:
BEML Ltd announces participation in Elara Capital's conference call on 12.02.2026 at 1 PM.
The call will discuss financial results for the quarter ended 31.12.2025.

news.title:
BEML Ltd surged 7.2% on 9 Feb 2026, hitting Rs 1,731.9 intraday high.
The robust rally outperformed its sector and broader market, signaling strong momentum.
news.summary:
BEML Ltd surged 7.2% on 9 Feb 2026, hitting Rs 1,731.9 intraday high.
The robust rally outperformed its sector and broader market, signaling strong momentum.

news.title:
BEML Ltd reported robust revenue growth in Q4 FY2025, but faced significant losses.
The firm's financial trend shifted negative, reflecting challenges despite top-line expansion.
news.summary:
BEML Ltd reported robust revenue growth in Q4 FY2025, but faced significant losses.
The firm's financial trend shifted negative, reflecting challenges despite top-line expansion.

news.title:
BEML to invest ₹1,500 crore in BRAHMA rail facility in MP, funded via long-term debt.
BEML Q3FY26 saw losses of ₹22.4 crore, revenue rose 23.7% to ₹1,083 crore, shares fell 6.7%.
news.summary:
BEML to invest ₹1,500 crore in BRAHMA rail facility in MP, funded via long-term debt.
BEML Q3FY26 saw losses of ₹22.4 crore, revenue rose 23.7% to ₹1,083 crore, shares fell 6.7%.

news.title:
BEML board approves ₹1,500 crore investment for new rail plant in Umiyara.
Project to be funded via long-term debt, executed in 5 phases over 5 years.
news.summary:
BEML board approves ₹1,500 crore investment for new rail plant in Umiyara.
Project to be funded via long-term debt, executed in 5 phases over 5 years.

news.title:
India plans to expand Vande Bharat fleet to 4,500 trainsets by 2047, benefiting stocks like BEML, BHEL, Titagarh Rail, Ramkrishna Forgings, and RVNL.
These companies, involved in manufacturing, supply chain, and maintenance, are poised for revenue growth due to the ambitious rail modernization drive.
news.summary:
India plans to expand Vande Bharat fleet to 4,500 trainsets by 2047, benefiting stocks like BEML, BHEL, Titagarh Rail, Ramkrishna Forgings, and RVNL.
These companies, involved in manufacturing, supply chain, and maintenance, are poised for revenue growth due to the ambitious rail modernization drive.

news.title:
BEML's Q3 EBITDA plummeted to ₹36M from ₹604M YOY.
Q3 EBITDA margin dropped sharply to 0.3% from 6.9% YOY.
news.summary:
BEML's Q3 EBITDA plummeted to ₹36M from ₹604M YOY.
Q3 EBITDA margin dropped sharply to 0.3% from 6.9% YOY.

news.title:
Tata Steel, Siemens, Bosch, Shree Cements, MRF, and others to report Q3 FY26 results on Feb 6.
Updates include Jubilant Pharmova, JK Tyre, Whirlpool, G R Infraprojects, Sun TV Network, and more.
news.summary:

news.title:
BEML Ltd announced designation changes in senior management under Regulation 30.
Shri Shekhar K promoted to Executive Director; other changes noted for compliance.
news.summary:
BEML Ltd announced designation changes in senior management under Regulation 30.
Shri Shekhar K promoted to Executive Director; other changes noted for compliance.

news.title:
BEML Land Assets reported a Q3 FY26 net loss of ₹0.46 crore, an improvement from Q2 FY26 but worse than Q3 FY25.
The stock fell 1.7% to ₹196.60, reflecting concerns over operational viability and cash flow generation.
news.summary:
BEML Land Assets reported a Q3 FY26 net loss of ₹0.46 crore, an improvement from Q2 FY26 but worse than Q3 FY25.
The stock fell 1.7% to ₹196.60, reflecting concerns over operational viability and cash flow generation.

news.title:
BEML Ltd’s market cap fell ₹6.8b last week, impacting state/government, which owns 54%, and institutions holding 23%.
State/government's 54% stake gives significant control, while general public holds 23% and institutions 23%, reflecting diverse ownership.
news.summary:
BEML Ltd’s market cap fell ₹6.8b last week, impacting state/government, which owns 54%, and institutions holding 23%.
State/government's 54% stake gives significant control, while general public holds 23% and institutions 23%, reflecting diverse ownership.

news.title:
PL Capital expects BEL, HAL, and BEML to report strong Q3 YoY sales growth driven by robust order books.
Targets: BEL Rs 407, HAL Rs 5,507, BEML Rs 1,982; HAL preferred for air defense modernization and strong order book.
news.summary:
PL Capital expects BEL, HAL, and BEML to report strong Q3 YoY sales growth driven by robust order books.
Targets: BEL Rs 407, HAL Rs 5,507, BEML Rs 1,982; HAL preferred for air defense modernization and strong order book.

news.title: BEML Ltd secures ₹110 crore order from Ministry of Defence for engine supply.
news.summary: BEML Ltd secures ₹110 crore order from Ministry of Defence for engine supply.

news.title:
BEML targets 15-20% revenue growth and 150 bps margin improvement, projecting an order book over ₹20,000 crore.
Supply chain issues easing; Q3 results expected to improve. Stock trades at ₹1,714.80, down 23% YoY on NSE.
news.summary:
BEML targets 15-20% revenue growth and 150 bps margin improvement, projecting an order book over ₹20,000 crore.
Supply chain issues easing; Q3 results expected to improve. Stock trades at ₹1,714.80, down 23% YoY on NSE.

news.title:
BEML Ltd presented at Elara Capital Investors Meet, showcasing its diverse business verticals and strategic developments.
Key achievements include Rs. 16,342 Cr order book, Vande Bharat sleeper train trials, and new warehousing facility inauguration.
news.summary:
BEML Ltd presented at Elara Capital Investors Meet, showcasing its diverse business verticals and strategic developments.
Key achievements include Rs. 16,342 Cr order book, Vande Bharat sleeper train trials, and new warehousing facility inauguration.
